programme.title: This is Hockey
programme.desc: The Puerto Rico Ice Hockey Federation sounds illogical but not to its leader and members who have enjoyed success and a growing interest on the island, which even hosted an NHL game in 2006. The issue is getting an ice surface back on the island.
